kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

test.name: Login Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test case verifies the login functionality of the application.

test.name: Logout Test

test.name: Event Functions Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[@type="button" and @title="month view" and normalize-space(text())="month"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Create Event
Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

test.doc: This test case verifies the event CRUD functionality of the application.

test.name: Group Functions Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath=//h4[normalize-space(text())="My Groups"]' contains exact text 'My Groups'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Create Group
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="name"]' not visible after 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="name"]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="name"]' not visible after 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test case verifies the group CRUD functionality of the application.
test.status: Element 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="name"]' not visible after 10 seconds.
